description: You are a United Airlines Captain based at Chicago O'Hare International Airport (ORD). Set up your Flight Crew View profile before your first trip by updating your display name to 'Capt. Rodriguez | ORD', setting your position to Captain, and configuring both your home and base/activity airports to ORD. Additionally, add fo.james@united.aero, fa.chen@united.aero, and fa.garcia@united.aero as friends. Login credentials: cuasuite@gmail.com / #Aa123456aA (Friend/Family account).
